refundPolicyText:
Last updated: April 22, 2026

Thank you for using our Service.

## Digital Product
All purchases are for digital services and are delivered instantly via activation code or account access.

## No Refunds After Activation or Use
By purchasing our Service, you agree that:
• Once an activation code is used, the purchase is considered consumed and non-refundable.
• Once any generation or feature (including at least one generated result) is used, the Service is considered rendered and non-refundable.

## Exceptions
We may only issue a refund if:
• You were accidentally charged multiple times.
• The activation code does not work due to a technical issue on our end.

## Subscription Cancellation
You can cancel your subscription at any time.
• After cancellation, you will maintain access until the end of the billing period.
• No partial refunds are provided for unused time.

## Abuse and Chargebacks
If a user attempts to request a refund after activating a code or using the Service, we reserve the right to deny the request.
• Chargebacks initiated without contacting us first may result in account termination.

## Contacts
If you have payment issues, contact: support@tt-comments.online
termsPolicyText:
Last updated: April 22, 2026

By accessing or using our website and services ("Service"), you agree to these Terms.

## Service Description
We provide an online tool that allows users to generate TikTok-style comments, visuals, and related content for entertainment, design, and demonstration purposes.

## User Requirements
You must be at least 13 years old to use this Service.

## User Responsibility
You agree not to:
• Use the Service for illegal or deceptive purposes.
• Impersonate others or create harmful content.
• Violate any applicable laws or platform rules.

You are solely responsible for how you use the generated content.

## Intellectual Property
All content, design, and functionality of the Service are owned by us.
Generated content can be used by you, but you must ensure it does not violate laws or third-party rights.

## Payments and Subscriptions
Some features require payment.
• Subscriptions are billed automatically unless cancelled.
• Prices are subject to change at any time.
• You are responsible for managing your subscription.

## Watermarks and Limitations
Free users may receive results with watermarks or limitations. Premium users can unlock additional features.

## Disclaimer
This Service is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by TikTok.
All generated materials are fictional.

## Limitation of Liability
We are not liable for any damages, misuse, or consequences resulting from the use of our Service.

## Termination
We may suspend or terminate your access if you violate these Terms.

## Changes to Terms
We may update these Terms at any time. Continued use means you accept the changes.

## Contacts
For questions, contact: support@tt-comments.online
privacyPolicyText:
Last updated: April 22, 2026

We value your privacy and are committed to protecting your personal data.

## Information We Collect
We may collect:
• Basic usage data (pages visited, interactions).
• Device and browser information.
• Optional account data or payment details (if you purchase a subscription).

We DO NOT store the content you generate unless specified otherwise.

## How We Use Information
We use your data to:
• Improve our services.
• Process payments.
• Analyze usage and performance.
• Prevent abuse.

## Cookies
We may use cookies and similar technologies to enhance your experience and analyze traffic.

## Third-Party Services
We may use third-party services (e.g., payment providers, analytics tools) that process data according to their own privacy policies.

## Data Security
We implement reasonable security measures to protect your information. However, no system is perfectly secure.

## Your Rights
Depending on your location, you may have the right to:
• Access your data.
• Request deletion.
• Withdraw consent.

## Changes
We may update this policy. Continued use of the service means you accept the updated policy.

## Contacts
If you have questions, contact: support@tt-comments.online
gdprPolicyText:
## GDPR Compliance (For EU Users)
If you are in the European Economic Area (EEA), you have certain rights under the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR).

## Legal Basis for Processing
We process your data based on:
• Your consent (e.g., cookies, analytics)
• Contractual necessity (e.g., providing paid services)
• Legitimate interests (e.g., improving service, preventing abuse)

## Your Rights
You have the right to:
• Access your personal data
• Request correction of inaccurate data
• Request deletion of your data ("right to be forgotten")
• Restrict or object to processing
• Request data portability
• Withdraw consent at any time

## Data Retention
We keep personal data only as long as necessary to provide our services or comply with legal obligations.

## Data Transfers
Your data may be processed outside the EEA (e.g., by third-party payment services). In such cases, we ensure appropriate safeguards are in place.

## Contacts and Requests
To exercise your rights, contact us: support@tt-comments.online
We will respond within 30 days as required by GDPR.
faqText:
## What is TikTok Gen?
It is an online tool that allows you to create realistic TikTok-style comments with custom text, avatars, verification badges, likes, and timestamps.

## Is this tool free?
Yes, you can use basic features for free. Some advanced features (e.g., watermark removal, SVG export, or AI voice) require a PRO code.

## Are these generated comments real?
No. All generated comments are fictional and created solely for entertainment, design, or demonstration purposes.

## Can I use generated content for commercial purposes?
Yes, but you are solely responsible for how you use it.

## Do I need to create an account?
An account is not required to use the service. Access to premium features is handled via a one-time access code system.

## What formats can I export in?
You can export generated comments as images (PNG or vector SVG).

## Is my data safe?
We do not store the content you generate. Only basic analytical data may be collected to improve the service.

## Why is there a watermark?
Watermarks are applied to free exports. You can remove them by purchasing a PRO code.

## How can I cancel my subscription?
Since we use one-time PRO access codes (valid for 7 days), we do not have automatic monthly charges. Your access will simply expire at the end of the code's validity period.

## Is this affiliated with TikTok?
No. This tool is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by TikTok.
